summary: Centralized Discount Management System testing completed successfully. All backend API tests passed (17/17). Frontend UI verified with Centralized Discount Settings section present in all modals (Item, BOGO, Tiered) with toggles for Global Discount, Auto-Apply, Allow Branch Override, and Apply On Channels (POS, Online Orders, Manual Invoice). Channel badges display correctly in the discount table.

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby (accessibility warning, non-blocking)

features_tested.feature: Item Discount creation with centralized settings
details: POST /api/item-discounts correctly saves is_global, auto_apply, allow_branch_override, applicable_store_ids, excluded_store_ids, apply_on fields
GET /api/item-discounts returns discounts with centralized fields

features_tested.feature: Item Discount calculation with store and channel filtering
details: GET /api/item-discounts/calculate accepts store_id and apply_on parameters
Discounts are filtered based on channel (pos/online/invoice) and store exclusions

features_tested.feature: BOGO Offer creation with centralized settings
details: POST /api/bogo-offers correctly saves centralized fields
GET /api/bogo-offers returns offers with centralized fields

features_tested.feature: BOGO calculation with store and channel filtering
details: POST /api/bogo-offers/calculate accepts store_id and apply_on parameters
Filters based on is_global, excluded_store_ids, and apply_on channel

features_tested.feature: Tiered Discount creation with centralized settings
details: POST /api/tiered-discounts correctly saves centralized fields
GET /api/tiered-discounts returns discounts with centralized fields

features_tested.feature: Tiered Discount calculation with store and channel filtering
details: GET /api/tiered-discounts/calculate accepts store_id and apply_on parameters
Correctly filters discounts based on centralized settings
POST /api/discounts/calculate-all applies centralized filtering to all discount types
Returns store_id and apply_on in response

features_tested.feature: Frontend - Centralized Settings Section in Item Discount Modal
details: CentralizedSettingsSection component present with Global Discount, Auto-Apply, Allow Branch Override toggles
Apply On Channels section with POS, Online Orders, Manual Invoice buttons

features_tested.feature: Frontend - Centralized Settings Section in BOGO Modal
details: Same centralized settings section as Item Discount modal

features_tested.feature: Frontend - Centralized Settings Section in Tiered Modal
details: Same centralized settings section as Item Discount modal

features_tested.feature: Frontend - Channel Badges in Discount Table
details: CentralizedBadge component displays Global, Auto-Apply badges
Channel badges (pos, online, invoice) displayed for each discount

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Backend models (ItemDiscountCreate, BOGOOfferCreate, TieredDiscountCreate) correctly define centralized fields with sensible defaults
GOOD: Calculate APIs filter discounts based on store_id and apply_on channel
GOOD: Auto_apply flag is respected - discounts with auto_apply=False are skipped in calculations
GOOD: Frontend CentralizedSettingsSection component is reused across all 3 discount modals
GOOD: CentralizedBadge component displays appropriate badges in the table
seed_data_creation: Test discounts created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Centralized Discount Management System is fully implemented and working. Backend APIs support store_id and apply_on filtering for all discount types. Frontend DiscountManagementPage.js has CentralizedSettingsSection component in all modals with toggles for is_global, auto_apply, allow_branch_override and channel selection. CentralizedBadge component displays Global, Auto-Apply, and channel badges in the discount table.
